## 🔗 Join the Community!
Need help, want to report bugs, or just chat with others using this datapack?  
👉 **[Join our Discord server](https://discord.gg/EPanvaseKx)** — everyone’s welcome!  

---

## 📦 Installation Guide:
This Datapack is compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.4+**.

To install:
1. **Remove** any previous version of the datapack.
2. **Place** the new version into your world's `datapacks` folder.

> ⚠️ **Important:**  
> Make sure to **download and enable the Resource Pack**

---

## ❓ FAQ

**Q1:** *Where can I download the Resource Pack?*  
**A1**: Open the **Datapack download page** — there will be an additional **Resourcepack** file available for download separately.

<details>
<summary>Show step by step</summary>
  
### **Step 𝟭**
> Go to version tab
  
![guide_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/356c39ac44ab2a10ef66b584e253db8e33b3e29f.png)
---
### **Step 𝟮**
> Select *any* version you want to download and then click into it. (This image just for example)

![guide_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b5be7005d045962486c7e80674a5e0d9239e46e.png)
---
### **Step 𝟯**
> Scroll down to the bottom until you find Files. It have two file, ones for DP and ones for RP

![guide_3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6e022b1ede373824b17d48e23548acebec8542.png)
</details>

**Q2:** *Is this datapack support in multiplayer?*  
**A2:** Yes, definitely!
